title: Promised Land
description: Exploring social commentary and personal struggle.
lyrics: Tonight, I'm gonna ride to the land I don't care who's comin' with me, you can see it's history It's like a new phrase dies It's like understandin' the wrongs of your rights Wait, is that left till we go up? No right wing or wrong wing Just a thing you say inside your zone You share it with everyone Hopin' you understand that one day you can be more than Just a thing that fucks everyone up Just a thing that makes you so goddamn tough If you can get rid of letting go vortex Just maybe we can find our promised land Our promised land Some of the things we promised us before we turned into this, our promised land Yeah, maybe we can find it But it's fuckin' up Worst maze I've ever seen But we rumble again again And me pullin' out our pinkie and jumpin' baby In the, in the hearts of the darkness we know despair lives there With our violence undercutting everywhere we look Can't have that If we're gonna survive this, take a bus, we got a backpack Gotta rewind that Gotta find a way to make it past All the hate that we're givin' to each other Talkin' murder, rape, killin', what you doin' with that? Dictatorship of my leadership Ayy, we need promised lands Like we promised ourselves from the beginning, yeah We need promised lands There's gonna be something other than death, yeah Then you're movin', tellin' me why, why you shootin' that? And I'm sayin' fuck you, you're takin' mine, you're takin' my youngest born, you're takin' everything that I have How am I supposed to build When it's all lies Lies, lies, lies, lies, lies in your promised land I can never see you here Or maybe angels fly from the chest of the old that you gave us Help us find the prom Mess up our souls, yeah, prom Of the past and the aim Comin' from from you to all to make a circle of it Let's not keep the pain inside and find our promised land Oh, take my hand It's a jungle, we can circle, kill it, take it, make it, be it, better come around I know you can, can't you hear me too, man? And woman, and woman, promise, promise me

lyricsSegments.text: Tonight, I'm gonna ride to the land I don't care who's comin' with me, you can see it's history
It's like a new phrase dies It's like understandin' the wrongs of your rights
Wait, is that left till we go up? No right wing or wrong wing
Just a thing you say inside your zone You share it with everyone
Hopin' you understand that one day you can be more than
Just a thing that fucks everyone up Just a thing that makes you so goddamn tough
If you can get rid of letting go vortex Just maybe we can find our promised land
Our promised land
Some of the things we promised us before we turned into this, our promised land
Yeah, maybe we can find it
But it's fuckin' up
Worst maze I've ever seen
But we rumble again again
And me pullin' out our pinkie and jumpin' baby
In the, in the hearts of the darkness we know despair lives there
With our violence undercutting everywhere we look
Can't have that
If we're gonna survive this, take a bus, we got a backpack
Gotta rewind that
Gotta find a way to make it past
All the hate that we're givin' to each other
Talkin' murder, rape, killin', what you doin' with that?
Dictatorship of my leadership
Ayy, we need promised lands
Like we promised ourselves from the beginning, yeah
We need promised lands
There's gonna be something other than death, yeah
Then you're movin', tellin' me why, why you shootin' that?
And I'm sayin' fuck you, you're takin' mine, you're takin' my youngest born, you're takin' everything that I have
How am I supposed to build
When it's all lies
Lies, lies, lies, lies, lies in your promised land
I can never see you here
Or maybe angels fly from the chest of the old that you gave us
Help us find the prom
Mess up our souls, yeah, prom
Of the past and the aim
Comin' from from you to all to make a circle of it
Let's not keep the pain inside and find our promised land
Oh, take my hand
It's a jungle, we can circle, kill it, take it, make it, be it, better come around
I know you can, can't you hear me too, man?
And woman, and woman, promise, promise me
